name: Red Team Review
description: Multi-perspective adversarial review - security, architecture, and UX specialists tear apart your codebase

workers.focus: OWASP top 10, authentication/authorization flaws, injection vulnerabilities, secrets exposure, input validation, CSRF/XSS, insecure deserialization
Scalability bottlenecks, tight coupling, poor error handling, missing retry/fallback patterns, single points of failure, dependency risks, API design flaws
Usability problems, accessibility violations (WCAG 2.1), missing error states, confusing flows, loading states, mobile responsiveness, form validation UX
